case_title: TAHA, ASHRAF VS VISA TRAVELLERS CHEQUES ADM. C/O TOM GALLIGER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY TAHA, ASHRAF AS TO DEFENDANT VISA TRAVELLERS CHEQUES ADM. C/O TOM GALLIGER INTERPAYMENT TRAVELERS CHECKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO TOM GALLIGER RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-10-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAHA, ASHRAF IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INTERPAYMENT TRAVELERS CHECKS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO VISA TRAVELLERS CHEQUES ADM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
